steps.title: Set up pure saline
steps.content:
Let $x$ be the number of liters of $28\%$ saline solution added. The amount of pure saline before and after mixing must match.
$$0.12(4)+0.28x=0.18(4+x)$$

steps.title: Solve the mixture equation
steps.content:
Expand both sides, then collect the $x$ terms on one side and the constants on the other side.
$$0.48+0.28x=0.72+0.18x$$
$$0.10x=0.24$$
$$x=2.4$$
The value of $x$ is the number of liters of the stronger solution to add. The answer is 2.4.
